payload.answer: Please provide clarification on which Sam note is referenced and whether cloud escalation should be re-enabled for handling the ambiguity.

entity_resolution.reason: ambiguous reference to Sam and unclear context about which note is meant; Cloud escalation is disabled per statement.

memory_cards.statement: Cloud escalation is disabled and model confidence is low for ambiguous Sam note.

details: Processed input with ambiguity and disabled escalation.

repair_options: Re-enable cloud escalation to allow automated handling of ambiguous notes (if policy permits).
Request user to specify Sam note details (date, context) to resolve ambiguity.
Annotate note as pending clarification and do not act on it until clarified.
